patterns.description: URLs incorrectly display www prefix when not present in original
patterns.rootCause: URL parsing logic adds www prefix during display formatting
patterns.solution: Use cleanHostname property instead of raw hostname
patterns.tddRecommendation: Add comprehensive www prefix test cases

patterns.description: Preview thumbnails fail to load due to CORS or network issues
patterns.rootCause: Missing CORS headers and image proxy configuration
patterns.solution: Implement image proxy and fallback handling
patterns.tddRecommendation: Test error states and fallback scenarios

patterns.description: Preview components crash on malformed URLs or network errors
patterns.rootCause: Insufficient error handling in component lifecycle
patterns.solution: Add comprehensive error boundaries and validation
patterns.tddRecommendation: Test all error scenarios and edge cases

reasoning: URL length and www detection patterns strongly correlate

Component complexity indicates display logic vulnerability
predictions.preventionStrategy: Implement URL cleaning at parser level

reasoning: Safari and Firefox showing different www behavior

bottlenecks.description: Frequent DOM updates during preview rendering
bottlenecks.impact: Causes layout shifts and poor user experience
bottlenecks.recommendation: Batch DOM updates and use CSS transforms

bottlenecks.description: Preview components not properly cleaned up
bottlenecks.recommendation: Add proper cleanup in component unmount
